title: sida malayana
intro: Sida malayana, also known as the Malay sida or Malay country mallow, is a plant species in the Malvaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Sida malayana include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use in reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Sida malayana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, making it a popular remedy in traditional herbal medicine.
